name: ARVINAS, INC.
business: We are a clinical-stage biotechnology company dedicated to improving the lives of patients suffering from debilitating and life-threatening diseases through our PROTAC protein degradation platform. We are currently progressing product candidates through clinical development programs: ARV-102 (LRRK2 degrader for neurodegenerative diseases), ARV-806 (KRAS G12D degrader for solid tumors), ARV-393 (BCL6 degrader for non-Hodgkin lymphoma), ARV-027 (polyQ-AR degrader for spinal bulbar muscular atrophy), and vepdegestrant (ER degrader for breast cancer).

exposures.sentence: We are a clinical-stage biotechnology company dedicated to improving the lives of patients suffering from debilitating and life-threatening diseases. Through our PROteolysis TArgeting Chimera, or PROTAC, protein degradation platform, we are pioneering the development of a new class of therapeutics designed to harness the body's own natural protein disposal system to selectively and efficiently degrade and remove disease-causing proteins.

catalysts.event: PDUFA action date for vepdegestrant NDA
catalysts.sentence: The U.S. Food and Drug Administration, or FDA, has accepted our New Drug Application, or NDA, for vepdegestrant... and has assigned a Prescription Drug User Fee Act, or PDUFA, action date of June 5, 2026.

catalysts.event: Data from multiple dose cohort of ARV-102 Phase 1 in PD patients
catalysts.sentence: We plan to present data from the multiple dose cohort of the Phase 1 clinical trial of ARV-102 in patients with PD in the first quarter of 2026 in an oral presentation at 2026 AD/PD.

catalysts.event: Initiation of Phase 1b clinical trial of ARV-102 in PSP patients
catalysts.sentence: Pending regulatory feedback, we plan to initiate a Phase 1b clinical trial of ARV-102 in patients with PSP in the first half of 2026.

catalysts.event: Potential initiation of registrational trial of ARV-102 in PSP
catalysts.sentence: and have the potential to initiate a registrational trial of ARV-102 in PSP in late 2026, pending regulatory feedback.

catalysts.event: Initiation of Phase 1 clinical trial of ARV-6723
catalysts.sentence: Pending regulatory feedback, we plan to initiate a Phase 1 clinical trial of ARV-6723 in patients with advanced solid tumors in mid-2026.

catalysts.event: Updated clinical data from Phase 1 trial of ARV-393
catalysts.sentence: We plan to share updated clinical data from the ongoing Phase 1 clinical trial of ARV-393 in patients with relapsed/refractory NHL at a medical congress in the second half of 2026.

catalysts.event: Initiation of glofitamab combination cohort for ARV-393
catalysts.sentence: We also plan to initiate enrollment of a glofitamab combination cohort in patients with DLBCL in the ongoing Phase 1 clinical trial of ARV-393 in the first half of 2026.

catalysts.event: Initial clinical data from ARV-806 Phase 1 trial
catalysts.sentence: We plan to continue enrollment in this clinical trial and anticipate sharing initial clinical data in patients with solid tumors harboring KRAS G12D mutations in 2026.

tamClaims.claim: PD affects approximately 1.1 million people in the U.S. and more than 10 million people worldwide.
tamClaims.sentence: It is estimated that PD affects approximately 1.1 million people in the U.S. and more than 10 million people worldwide.

tamClaims.claim: PSP estimated annual prevalence of approximately five to seven per 100,000 persons globally.
tamClaims.sentence: PSP has an estimated annual prevalence of approximately five to seven per 100,000 persons globally.

tamClaims.claim: Approximately 60,000 newly diagnosed PDAC patients per year in the U.S.
tamClaims.sentence: There are approximately 60,000 newly diagnosed PDAC patients per year in the U.S., based on 2026 estimates.

tamClaims.claim: Approximately 158,000 newly diagnosed colorectal cancer patients each year in the U.S.
tamClaims.sentence: There are approximately 158,000 newly diagnosed colorectal cancer patients each year in the U.S., based on 2026 estimates.

tamClaims.claim: Approximately 195,000 newly diagnosed NSCLC patients per year in the U.S.
tamClaims.sentence: There are approximately 195,000 newly diagnosed NSCLC patients per year in the U.S., based on 2026 estimates.

tamClaims.claim: Approximately 80,000 new cases of NHL in U.S. annually.
tamClaims.sentence: It is estimated that there were approximately 80,000 new cases and approximately 19,300 deaths in the U.S. related to NHL annually in 2025 based on data from SEER.

tamClaims.claim: Approximately 70% of all breast cancer cases are ER+.
tamClaims.sentence: Approximately 70% of all breast cancer cases, including males, are ER+, based on SEER data.

tamClaims.claim: Approximately 20,000 patients in the U.S. with ESR1 mutated, ER+/HER2- advanced or metastatic breast cancer in second line plus setting.
tamClaims.sentence: In addition, there are approximately 20,000 patients in the U.S. with ESR1 mutated, ER+/HER2- advanced or metastatic breast cancer in the second line plus setting, based on SEER data from 2023.
